query: Find 10 parcels in Drammen municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect 200-year flood zones, sorted by distance to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending.

1.description: Get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: Get parcels in Drammen larger than 5000 m²

4.description: Get quick-clay hazard zones in Drammen

6.description: Calculate distance from each parcel to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone

7.description: Sort parcels by distance to nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending

executions.sql:
SELECT
    kommunenummer,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE
    kommunenavn = 'Drammen';

SELECT
    teig.teigref,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(teig.geom, 4326)) AS geom_geojson,
    ST_Area(teig.geom) AS area_m2
FROM
    matrikkeleneiendomskart.teig teig
JOIN
    matrikkeleneiendomskart.matrikkelenhet enhet ON teig.teigref = enhet.teigref
WHERE
    enhet.kommunenummer = '3301'
    AND ST_Area(teig.geom) > 5000;

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT
    kommunenummer,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE
    kommunenavn = 'Drammen';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkel]
SELECT
    teig.teigref,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(teig.geom, 4326)) AS geom_geojson,
    ST_Area(teig.geom) AS area_m2
FROM
    matrikkeleneiendomskart.teig teig
JOIN
    matrikkeleneiendomskart.matrikkelenhet enhet ON teig.teigref = enhet.teigref
WHERE
    enhet.kommunenummer = '3301'
    AND ST_Area(teig.geom) > 5000;
